name: Scalding Kiss
descrip: Deeply kiss your opponent. Can charm them.
outcome: With an indignant scowl [AttackerName] roughly kisses [TargetName], clearly getting aggressively competitive about the increasingly heated makeout session as your tongues entangle for dominance, the hellhound's hot saliva intermingling with yours, and warm pleasure spreads through your entire head.
miss: With an indignant scowl [AttackerName] roughly kisses [TargetName], but [TargetName] manages to endure the assertive attempt to take over the makeout session!
statusOutcome: [TargetName] is reeling and breathless from [AttackerName]'s warm, domineering kiss, leaving [TargetHimOrHer] charmed and kiss drunk!
